misc.title: Germany, you are now my last hope to go into the bed with a smile, don´t disappoint me. One side the one piece chapter is gold, but Japan losing hurts me...

misc.title: Brazil 2:1 in the last minute.... Still respect to Japan, they played well, this might be the chance to build up a great team for the other tournaments...

misc.title: Good question. Oda wrote Glow’s name as グロウ, not グロー. グロウ is read as gurō, making it a homophone of 愚弄, which means “mockery” or “to ridicule” in Japanese. Considering what he did, the name feels quit
misc.text: Good question. Oda wrote Glow’s name as グロウ, not グロー. グロウ is read as gurō, making it a homophone of 愚弄, which means “mockery” or “to ridicule” in Japanese. Considering what he did, the name feels quite fitting.😥 IcefisherTenacity (@Icefisher10) I see you’ve gone with ‘Glow’ for his romanized name. after the truly despicable things he’s done, not just to Candelle, but most likely to many other women. I’d say the name ‘Guro’ is much more fitting for a Grotesque person such as he. — https://nitter.net/Icefisher10/status/2071616953295175973#m

misc.title: It’s 3 :30 a.m. here, but I’m still up watching the World Cup. Japan vs. Brazil is tied 1–1 at the moment, and I’m really looking forward to seeing how it turns out.🔥 Oda watched the 2002 World Cup o
misc.text: It’s 3 :30 a.m. here, but I’m still up watching the World Cup. Japan vs. Brazil is tied 1–1 at the moment, and I’m really looking forward to seeing how it turns out.🔥 Oda watched the 2002 World Cup on TV and praised the passionate support of the Korean fans.🧡

items.text: Good question. Oda wrote Glow’s name as グロウ, not グロー. グロウ is read as gurō, making it a homophone of 愚弄, which means “mockery” or “to ridicule” in Japanese. Considering what he did, the name feels quite fitting.😥 IcefisherTenacity (@Icefisher10) I see you’ve gone with ‘Glow’ for his romanized name. after the truly despicable things he’s done, not just to Candelle, but most likely to many other women. I’d say the name ‘Guro’ is much more fitting for a Grotesque person such as he. — https://nitter.net/Icefisher10/status/2071616953295175973#m
